description: Bugfix cycle 1 for Milestone 22 -- Chat File Attachments. Fixes 1 defect (DEF-001): 5 pre-existing ruff lint errors that cause the REQUIRED ruff gate to fail.

userStories.title: Fix: ruff lint errors in 5 pre-existing files
userStories.description: Fix all 5 ruff lint errors so that `ruff check services/` exits 0. These are pre-existing errors not introduced by M22, but the pipeline REQUIRED gate demands zero ruff errors.
acceptanceCriteria: ruff check services/ exits 0 with no errors
userStories.notes:
Defect: DEF-001 from QA report qa-m22-chat-attachments.md.

Fix 1 (auto-fixable): services/core/apps/projects/migrations/0001_initial.py — I001 unsorted imports. Run `ruff check --fix` or manually reorder: put `import django.db.models.deletion` before `from django.db import migrations, models`.

Fix 2 (auto-fixable): services/core/apps/projects/migrations/0004_project_favorite.py — I001 unsorted imports. Same fix as above.

Fix 3 (auto-fixable): services/gateway/apps/projects/migrations/0006_project_favorite.py — I001 unsorted imports. Same fix as above.

Fix 4 (auto-fixable): services/ai/tests/test_pipeline.py:818 — W293 blank line contains whitespace. Remove trailing whitespace from the blank line.

Fix 5 (manual): services/ai/agents/facilitator/plugins.py:327 — E501 line too long (183 > 180). Break the long string literal across multiple concatenated strings to stay under 180 chars.

Suggested approach: Run `ruff check --fix services/` to auto-fix 4 of 5, then manually fix the E501 in plugins.py.

bugfixHistory.guidanceNote:
Application-level test failures detected. The test infrastructure appears healthy.

Focus on fixing the application code to satisfy test assertions. Check the error messages for expected vs actual values.

## Summary
Cycle 0 reviewed all 10 user stories and found all acceptance criteria met, all 878 Python tests passing, and no functional defects. However, the pipeline correctly rejected the milestone because `ruff check services/` (a REQUIRED gate) fails with 5 errors. Althou
